message:
fix(core): isolate runtime tests to prevent TLS-after-destruction abort

Tests that spawn background tasks via ObservationRuntime.start() caused
process abort (SIGABRT) when run in parallel with other tests, because
TLS destructors from the current_thread runtime collided across threads.

Add run_async_test_isolated() helper that runs the runtime on a dedicated
thread, ensuring TLS cleanup is self-contained. Applied to the two tests
that spawn background task trees: runtime_startup_shutdown and
runtime_emits_replay_capture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
